rulings.Case Title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL ET AL VS. ANNE KIHAGI ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Renotice Of Motion And Motion For Assignment Etc.
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 26, 2017 line 1. PLAINTIFFs CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO and THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA's Renotice Of Motion For Assignment Etc. GRANTED as follows: (1) Motion for assignment of rents, retraining order and turnover order is granted as requested with the effective date of January 1, 2018; (2) if Defendants post the undertaking for the full amount of the amended judgment as claimed in the opposition by December 31, 2017 (the Court notes that the last Court date this year is December 29, 2017) (Opposition 2:7), the order shall not go into effect; (3) if defendants receive any rental payments for January 2018 before the effective date of the order, those payments shall be turned over by no later than January 5, 2018 and then on on-going basis within 2 business days of receipt of payment until all payments are made directly to the Plaintiff by the obligors (tenants, lessees, etc.) The Court will not make any priority determinations at this time. If and when priority is claimed by a third party, a motion may be made to the Court to resolve the matter. The Court also notes that in the event Defendants wish to sell any on the affected properties, they may apply (regularly noticed motion) for the approval of the Court and for the determination of the distribution of the sale proceeds. = (501/LOT)

rulings.Case Title: LUISA HANSON VS. GERARDO C. SEGARRA ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 26, 2017 line 2. PLAINTIFF LUISA HANSON's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Hearing Required. = (501/LOT)
